body_text:
20:50 â December 31, 2020
FX Notes Plus Part Update
Exchange Bank of Canada has notified Central 1 that effective January 1, 2020, only USD currency is available for the purchase of drafts through the FX Notes Plus application.
The FX Notes Plus videos have been revised on the
FX Notes Plus Training Videos
page.
We updated the FX Notes Plus Part in the Payment Solutions Manual as described in the table below.
Currency Volume
FX Notes Plus Part
Section 7.2, Types of Currency Available for Notes and Drafts
Section 7.6, Cancelling Foreign Currency Orders
Section 7.7, Selling Drafts
Section 7.8, Reviewing Pending Drafts
We revised text and updated images as applicable.
Questions
